description: A group of DIDs that declare shared conventions. Self-constituted per P4: no central roll, no grading of legitimacy. Communities may be small and many.

main.description: A community is a self-constituted group declaring shared schemas, lenses, and conventions. Membership may be listed inline for small communities, or referenced for larger ones.

description.description: Purpose, norms, and scope of the community. Narrative, not machine-interpreted.

members.description: Inline list of member DIDs, for small communities. Use membershipRoll instead for communities above ~200 members.

membershipRoll.description: AT-URI pointing to an externally maintained membership record for larger communities.

coreSchemas.description: Schemas the community treats as canonical for its purposes.

coreLenses.description: Lenses the community treats as canonical.

endorsedCommunities.description: Other communities this community recognises as legitimate interlocutors. Endorsement is not transitive.

conventions.description: Community-specific conventions not captured by schemas or lenses (style guides, review expectations, review cadence).
